author: Shimoji, Michinori
title: A general overview of Irabu Ryukyuan, a Southern Ryukyuan language of the Japonic language group
container: 思言 : 東京外国語大学記述言語学論集
publisher: 東京外国語大学地域文化研究科・外国語学部記述言語学研究室
abstract_note: Fieldwork mid-term report outlining geography, genealogy, speaker situation, dialect classification on Irabu Island, and a compact sketch of phonology and grammar.
harvard_reference: Shimoji, M. (2006) 'A general overview of Irabu Ryukyuan, a Southern Ryukyuan language of the Japonic language group', 思言 : 東京外国語大学記述言語学論集, 1, pp. 31-65. doi:10.15026/90636.

author: Shimoji, Michinori
title: Syllable structure of Irabu Ryukyuan
container: 思言 : 東京外国語大学記述言語学論集
publisher: 東京外国語大学地域文化研究科・外国語学部記述言語学研究室
abstract_note: Describes Irabu syllable structure, including syllabic and non-syllabic phonemes, semi-consonants, moraicity, and phonotactic constraints.
harvard_reference: Shimoji, M. (2007) 'Syllable structure of Irabu Ryukyuan', 思言 : 東京外国語大学記述言語学論集, 2, pp. 21-40. doi:10.15026/90601.

author: Shimoji, Michinori
title: 南琉球語伊良部島方言の音韻論
container: 思言 : 東京外国語大学記述言語学論集
publisher: 東京外国語大学地域文化研究科・外国語学部記述言語学研究室
abstract_note: Comprehensive phonological description of the Nagahama variety, covering phoneme inventory, syllable and mora structure, prosody, clitics, and morphophonology.
harvard_reference: Shimoji, M. (2007) '南琉球語伊良部島方言の音韻論', 思言 : 東京外国語大学記述言語学論集, 3, pp. 35-83. doi:10.15026/90563.

author: 下地, 理則
title: 伊良部島方言の動詞屈折形態論
publisher: 法政大学沖縄文化研究所
abstract_note: Describes the inflectional morphology of Irabu verbs, focusing on stem formation, inflectional suffixes, and the internal structure of verb forms.
harvard_reference: 下地理則 (2008) '伊良部島方言の動詞屈折形態論', 琉球の方言, 32, pp. 69-114. doi:10.15002/00012534.

author: Shimoji, Michinori
title: 伊良部島方言の文法記述の諸単位
container: 思言 : 東京外国語大学記述言語学論集
publisher: 東京外国語大学地域文化研究科・外国語学部記述言語学研究室
abstract_note: Defines basic units and categories needed for grammatical description, including phrases, words, word classes, grammatical relations, argument structure, and morphological processes.
harvard_reference: Shimoji, M. (2008) '伊良部島方言の文法記述の諸単位', 思言 : 東京外国語大学記述言語学論集, 4, pp. 21-56. doi:10.15026/90553.

author: Shimoji, Michinori
title: A Grammar of Irabu, a Southern Ryukyuan Language
publisher: The Australian National University
abstract_note: First full descriptive grammar of Irabu Ryukyuan, covering phonology, morphology, nominal and verbal domains, property-concept words, clitics, functional typology, and complex clauses.
harvard_reference: Shimoji, M. (2008) A Grammar of Irabu, a Southern Ryukyuan Language. PhD thesis. The Australian National University. doi:10.25911/5d5fc82596df5.

author: Shimoji, Michinori
title: Foot and Rhythmic Structure in Irabu Ryukyuan
publisher: Japanese Linguistic Society
abstract_note: Argues that foot structure explains bimoraic constituency and alternating high/low tonal rhythm in Irabu prosody, treating the pattern as rhythmic rather than lexical accentual.
harvard_reference: Shimoji, M. (2009) 'Foot and Rhythmic Structure in Irabu Ryukyuan', Gengo Kenkyu, 135, pp. 85-122. doi:10.11435/gengo.135.0_85.

author: Shimoji, Michinori
title: The Adjective Class in Irabu Ryukyuan
publisher: The Society for Japanese Linguistics
abstract_note: Defines the adjective class in Irabu using internal morphosyntactic criteria and typological considerations, identifying reduplicated forms as the best adjective candidates.
harvard_reference: Shimoji, M. (2009) 'The Adjective Class in Irabu Ryukyuan', Studies in the Japanese Language, 5(3), pp. 33-50. doi:10.20666/nihongonokenkyu.5.3_33.

author: Shimoji, Michinori
title: Epistemic Modality in Irabu Ryukyuan
container: 思言 : 東京外国語大学記述言語学論集
publisher: 東京外国語大学地域文化研究科・外国語学部記述言語学研究室
abstract_note: Examines the epistemic modal suffix -m and the functions of M-forms in Irabu, addressing a long-standing issue in Ryukyuan linguistics.
harvard_reference: Shimoji, M. (2009) 'Epistemic Modality in Irabu Ryukyuan', 思言 : 東京外国語大学記述言語学論集, 5, pp. 25-42. doi:10.15026/90536.

author: Shimoji, Michinori
title: Irabu Ryukyuan
publisher: Research Institute for Languages and Cultures of Asia and Africa, Tokyo University of Foreign Studies
abstract_note: Grammar sketch of Irabu Ryukyuan, summarising major phonological and morphosyntactic patterns and providing a text sample.
harvard_reference: Shimoji, M. (2011) 'Irabu Ryukyuan', in Yamakoshi, Y. (ed.) Grammatical Sketches from the Field. Tokyo: Research Institute for Languages and Cultures of Asia and Africa, Tokyo University of Foreign Studies, pp. 79-136.

author: Shimoji, Michinori
title: Clitics in Irabu Ryukyuan
publisher: International Institute for Okinawan Studies, University of the Ryukyus
abstract_note: Identifies Irabu clitics such as case markers, information-structure markers, modal markers, and discourse markers, and distinguishes internal and external clitics phonologically.
harvard_reference: Shimoji, M. (2013) 'Clitics in Irabu Ryukyuan', International Journal of Okinawan Studies, 4(1), pp. 51-79.
source_checked: CiNii / University of the Ryukyus repository

author: Shimoji, Michinori
title: Mermaid construction in Irabu Ryukyuan
container: Adnominal clauses and the 'Mermaid construction': Grammaticalization of nouns
publisher: National Institute for Japanese Language and Linguistics
abstract_note: Describes the Mermaid construction in Irabu as part of a cross-linguistic project on adnominal clauses and noun grammaticalization.
harvard_reference: Shimoji, M. (2013) 'Mermaid construction in Irabu Ryukyuan', in Adnominal clauses and the 'Mermaid construction': Grammaticalization of nouns. Tokyo: National Institute for Japanese Language and Linguistics, pp. 221-248. doi:10.15084/00002664.

author: 富浜, 定吉
title: 宮古伊良部方言辞典
publisher: 沖縄タイムス社
abstract_note: Dictionary of the Irabu and Nakachi varieties, with about 17,800 entries, IPA, parts of speech, inflected verb forms, examples, and grammatical/phonological appendices.
harvard_reference: 富浜定吉 (2013) 宮古伊良部方言辞典. 那覇: 沖縄タイムス社. ISBN 9784871272148.

author: Kinuhata, Tomohide
title: Kakari-musubi of wh-questions in Miyako Ryukyuan: Focusing on the Aza-Irabu Dialect
publisher: Japanese Linguistic Society
abstract_note: Shows that the focus particle ga in the Aza-Irabu dialect functions in forming wh-questions, with evidence from direct and indirect questions and comparison with other Miyako varieties.
harvard_reference: Kinuhata, T. (2016) 'Kakari-musubi of wh-questions in Miyako Ryukyuan: Focusing on the Aza-Irabu Dialect', Gengo Kenkyu, 149, pp. 19-42. doi:10.11435/gengo.149.0_19.

author: 衣畑, 智秀
title: 宮古伊良部集落方言の疑問文イントネーション
container: 日本語疑問文の通時的・対照言語学的研究 研究成果報告書(3)
abstract_note: Research report on question intonation in the Aza-Irabu dialect, focusing on pitch patterns in interrogatives and typologically unusual falling question intonation.
harvard_reference: 衣畑智秀 (2016) '宮古伊良部集落方言の疑問文イントネーション', 日本語疑問文の通時的・対照言語学的研究 研究成果報告書(3), pp. 94-106.

author: 衣畑, 智秀
title: 係り結びと疑問詞の量化 : 宮古伊良部集落方言の事例から
container: 日本言語学会大会予稿集 第153回
publisher: 日本言語学会
abstract_note: Conference proceedings paper on kakari-musubi and wh-word quantification in the Aza-Irabu dialect.
harvard_reference: 衣畑智秀 (2016) '係り結びと疑問詞の量化 : 宮古伊良部集落方言の事例から', 日本言語学会大会予稿集, 第153回.

author: Shimoji, Michinori
title: A Grammar of Irabu: A Southern Ryukyuan Language
publisher: Kyushu University Press
abstract_note: Published English reference grammar of Irabu, based on the ANU dissertation and later research, with natural discourse texts.
harvard_reference: Shimoji, M. (2017) A Grammar of Irabu: A Southern Ryukyuan Language. Fukuoka: Kyushu University Press. ISBN 9784798501956.

author: 下地, 理則
title: 南琉球宮古語伊良部島方言
publisher: くろしお出版
abstract_note: Japanese descriptive grammar of the Irabu dialect of Miyako Ryukyuan, systematically covering phonology, word classes, morphology, and syntax.
harvard_reference: 下地理則 (2018) 南琉球宮古語伊良部島方言. 東京: くろしお出版. ISBN 9784874247600.

author: 狩俣, 繁久
title: 下地理則著『南琉球宮古語伊良部島方言』 / Michinori Shimoji著 A Grammar of Irabu: A Southern Ryukyuan Language
publisher: 日本語学会
abstract_note: Review essay assessing the 2017 English and 2018 Japanese grammars, noting their status as detailed reference grammars for Miyako and Ryukyuan studies.
harvard_reference: 狩俣繁久 (2019) '下地理則著『南琉球宮古語伊良部島方言』 / Michinori Shimoji著 A Grammar of Irabu: A Southern Ryukyuan Language', 日本語の研究, 15(3), pp. 26-33. doi:10.20666/nihongonokenkyu.15.3_26.

author: 五十嵐, 陽介
title: 南琉球宮古語伊良部佐和田方言のアクセント体系の初期報告
container: 日本言語学会第161回大会ワークショップ
abstract_note: Initial report arguing, contrary to earlier descriptions, that Sawada preserves contrastive accent, though accentual contrasts neutralise in many environments.
harvard_reference: 五十嵐陽介 (2020) '南琉球宮古語伊良部佐和田方言のアクセント体系の初期報告', 日本言語学会第161回大会ワークショップ.

author: Shimoji, Michinori
title: Verb-verb complexes in Irabu Ryukyuan
publisher: Oxford University Press
abstract_note: Classifies Irabu V-V complexes into phrasal complexes and one-word complexes, compares them with Japanese, and draws implications for Japanese historical linguistics.
harvard_reference: Shimoji, M. (2021) 'Verb-verb complexes in Irabu Ryukyuan', in Kageyama, T., Hook, P.E. and Pardeshi, P. (eds.) Verb-Verb Complexes in Asian Languages. Oxford: Oxford University Press, pp. 165-192. doi:10.1093/oso/9780198759508.003.0007.

author: 上地, 徳男
title: 佐良浜方言語彙辞典
publisher: ボーダーインク
abstract_note: Vocabulary dictionary focused on the Sarahama dialect, a variety spoken on Irabu Island and genealogically related to Ikema rather than core Irabu Ryukyuan.
harvard_reference: 上地徳男 (2021) 佐良浜方言語彙辞典. 那覇: ボーダーインク. ISBN 9784899824121.

author: 下地, 理則
title: 南琉球宮古語伊良部島方言の音節とモーラ構造
publisher: 東京外国語大学記述言語学研究室
abstract_note: Updates earlier descriptions of Irabu syllable and mora structure, arguing for an analysis that better explains the broader phonological and morphophonological system.
harvard_reference: 下地理則 (2025) '南琉球宮古語伊良部島方言の音節とモーラ構造', 思言, 20, pp. 87-116.

author: 仲宗根, 政善
title: 宮古伊良部町佐和田方言の音韻
publisher: 琉球大学附属図書館・仲宗根政善文庫
abstract_note: Archival manuscript on Sawada phonology and accent, including mora/syllable survey materials, sound correspondences, accent patterns, and examples.
harvard_reference: 仲宗根政善 (n.d.) 宮古伊良部町佐和田方言の音韻. 琉球大学附属図書館・仲宗根政善文庫.

author: 仲宗根, 政善
title: 宮古伊良部町長浜・多良間村塩川の方言
publisher: 琉球大学附属図書館・仲宗根政善文庫
scope: core: Nagahama phonology and lexicon; archival
abstract_note: Archival notes on the Nagahama dialect of Irabu and the Shiokawa dialect of Tarama, with phonological features, syllable lists, examples, and vocabulary.
harvard_reference: 仲宗根政善 (n.d.) 宮古伊良部町長浜・多良間村塩川の方言. 琉球大学附属図書館・仲宗根政善文庫.

author: 仲宗根, 政善
title: 宮古各地の方言の音韻
publisher: 琉球大学附属図書館・仲宗根政善文庫
scope: related: comparative Miyako; includes Irabu localities
abstract_note: Archival comparative phonology notes covering many Miyako localities, including Nagahama, Sawada, Sarahama, Irabu, and Kuninaka on Irabu Island.
harvard_reference: 仲宗根政善 (n.d.) 宮古各地の方言の音韻. 琉球大学附属図書館・仲宗根政善文庫.

author: 本永, 守靖
title: 伊良部方言の研究
container: 琉球の言語と文化：仲宗根政善先生古稀記念
publisher: 仲宗根政善先生古稀記念論集刊行委員会
abstract_note: 伊良部島佐和田方言を中心にした初期研究。後続の伊良部語記述研究で、Shimoji以前の主要な先行研究として参照される。
harvard_reference: 本永守靖 (1982) '伊良部方言の研究', in 仲宗根政善先生古稀記念論集刊行委員会編『琉球の言語と文化：仲宗根政善先生古稀記念』. 西原町: 仲宗根政善先生古稀記念論集刊行委員会.
source_checked: Confirmed against Naha City Museum bibliographic record and later Japanese reference lists; reprinted in 琉球方言考(7) but reprint page range differs across secondary sources

author: 沢木, 幹栄
title: 宮古方言の問題点
publisher: 日本音声学会
scope: related: Miyako phonetics; includes Irabu issues
abstract_note: 宮古方言の中舌母音・成節的子音など、子音性の強い音声・音韻特徴をめぐる解釈上の問題を論じる。
harvard_reference: 沢木幹栄 (2000) '宮古方言の問題点', 音声研究, 4(1), pp. 36-41. doi:10.24467/onseikenkyu.4.1_36.
